title: T-034 — Allergen-label validators (V-SHIP-LBL-01..05) + SSCC-ASN allergen element
prompt:
# T-034 — Allergen-label validators (V-SHIP-LBL-01..05)

## Goal
PRD §4.1 #6 lists allergen labelling on packing slip + BOL + SSCC ASN as a P1 Must, and §11 defines V-SHIP-LBL-01..05. Existing T-023 covers bold allergen list rendering on BOL/packing-slip PDFs, but no task owns the validator suite as a testable unit, nor the SSCC ASN Allergens GTIN-linked element (§13.3). Closes finding S-1. Scope = P1 validators + the allergen data-element shape only (the full retailer ASN file EDI-856/EPCIS JSON-LD is P2).

## Implementation contract
- `apps/web/lib/services/shipping-allergen-label-validator.ts` [create] — pure functions implementing V-SHIP-LBL-01..05; consumes products.allergens (03-TECH) + customers.allergen_restrictions; calls allergen_cascade_v1 (03-TECH rule).
  - V-SHIP-LBL-01: allergen list matches BOM cascade (via allergen_cascade_v1)
  - V-SHIP-LBL-02..04: no missing EU-14 allergens; customer-restriction conflict → segregation warning on picking sequence
  - V-SHIP-LBL-05: format validation
- unit tests [create] asserting each rule (pass + fail + segregation-warning paths).
- wire into T-023 (BOL/packing-slip generation) and T-013/T-016 (pick segregation warning) as a function call.

## Out of scope
- Retailer ASN transport file (EDI-856 / EPCIS JSON-LD) — P2 Epic 11-G/11-L.
- GS1 Digital Link QR — P2 (D-SHP-16).

## GS1 sourcing rule
The SSCC ASN allergen element references the product GTIN; any SSCC/GTIN identifier MUST read the GS1 company prefix from `organizations.gs1_company_prefix` (02-settings) — never from local config or a hardcoded value.

## Acceptance criteria
- AC1 — All five V-SHIP-LBL rules have RED-first unit tests, green.
- AC2 — BOL/packing-slip generation (T-023) rejects/flags per validators.
- AC3 — Pick flow shows segregation warning on customer-restricted allergen conflict.

pipeline_inputs.description: New task: allergen-label validator suite V-SHIP-LBL-01..05 (pure functions) + SSCC ASN allergen data element shape (P1), wired into T-023 BOL/packing-slip + T-013/T-016 pick segregation. Source: sidecar m11-T-033 stub (finding S-1). ASN transport file stays P2.
pipeline_inputs.details: V-SHIP-LBL-01 list==BOM cascade (allergen_cascade_v1); 02..04 missing EU-14 + customer-restriction conflict→segregation warning; 05 format. Consumes products.allergens (03-TECH) + customers.allergen_restrictions. P2 excluded: EDI-856/EPCIS ASN file, GS1 Digital Link QR.
out_of_scope: Retailer ASN transport file (EDI-856 / EPCIS JSON-LD) — P2 Epic 11-G/11-L.

cross_module_dependencies.reason: allergen_cascade_v1 rule + products.allergens consumed by the validators (resolve exact 03-TECH task id during consolidation).

acceptance_criteria: All five V-SHIP-LBL rules have RED-first unit tests, green.
Pick flow shows segregation warning on customer-restricted allergen conflict.
test_strategy: RED: unit tests for each V-SHIP-LBL rule (pass + fail + segregation-warning) before implementation.
GREEN: implement pure validator functions; wire into T-023 + T-013/T-016.
risk_red_lines: Keep ASN transport (EDI-856/EPCIS) out of scope — P2.

Validators are pure functions (no DB writes).
